text:

1)  I can't duplicate this (ie. Lynx works!).  If it happened reguarly, 
^H^H^H^H^H^H^H^H^Hstill and on everyone's systems, we would probably have 
been flooded with reports. 

2)  Ping to originator failed.  As usual, feel free to comment if you 
ever see this...
